title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): Even in Loss

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer and Mejiro McQueen both fail to
claim victory. However, Mejiro McQueen is
already looking toward the next race she can
enter for the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, Mejiro Palmer is confused.
She says she runs for her own freedom, but is that
really something to be proud of? Or is she just
being selfish?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next goal is the spring Grand Prix, the
Takarazuka Kinen. Will Mejiro Palmer be able to
be her true self at a festival race the fans go crazy
for?
